prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-CREATEPLAY-KP-PARENT Product Type: TOY_VEHICLE_SET Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio Tractor Set Create and Play Builder DIY Tools Toy Ages 3 and Up Description: The Kidplokio Create and Play DIY Tool Toy Sets are unique gifts for kids that encourage developing minds and motor skills. Your child can learn about how their toys are put together and taken apart with the DIY construct your toys tools that come with both the Farm Tractor and Construction Dump Truck playsets.

These sets come with kids assembly tools to put the toys together so that they can think like a little engineer. Not only will your little one be occupied for hours with this engaging playset, half the fun of it is putting the whole kit together with friends and family.

With this toy set kids will be engaging in crucial early educational activities, like working their fine motor and gross motor skills, as well as exercising their cognitive problem solving through these DIY building and imaginative pretend play sessions.

Lastly, all the play pieces of this construction toys kit, fit neatly in the included storage box for easy organization, and to ensure pieces aren't lost along the way. The plastic storage box with handle makes this a great toy for boys to travel with, as everything can be tucked away and safely stowed when not in use.

Let the construction begin.

Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts

Recommended Ages: 3+ Search Terms: toys for boys holiday toy list 2021 christmas gift hanukkah gifts stocking stuffer learning and education toys pretend play cosplay roleplay gifts under 50 dollars toddlers kids learning development create construct tractor trucks Features: (none) === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
